title: Allow Editing Items, Prevent Adding/Deleting Items
excerpt:
Hello, 
I need to prevent users from creating/deleting items but allow them to edit existing ones. What can I do to fix this?

posts.author: JaredJLY (Jared Young)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I need to prevent users from creating/deleting items but allow them to edit existing ones. What can I do to fix this?
